title: [kimi-review] 3bd50d3: [SEVERITY: high] Stack buffers are only safe if the response
description:
Commit: 3bd50d339
Message: fix(coap): eliminate shared response buffer race Handlers now use per-call stack buffers. Closes project-LICHEN-cx3a

Finding: [SEVERITY: high] Stack buffers are only safe if the response is fully consumed (serialized/transmitted) synchronously within the handler call. CoAP stacks commonly defer transmission (separate responses, retransmission of CON messages, observe notifications, async send queues). If anything retains a pointer to the buffer after the handler returns, this trades a race condition for a use-after-return. Verify no async path holds the buffer.
